ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To May-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Senick for Stefan Norberg.

Mr. Senick stated that the Probate Referee declined to change the appraisal and that he did not have all of the tax return information to request a Tax Certificate. The matter was continued to May 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To May-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Seneck for Stefan Norberg.

Mr. Seneck stated that he had contact with Mr. Norberg to explain what was happening but that there was no progress in getting things done. In addition, Mr. Seneck stated that he could talk to Mr. Norberg about the tax certificate, spoke of asking the Referee to amend the appraisal as the property sold for less than what it was appraised at, and asked permission for reimbursement of the filing fee for the Petition for Instructions. The matter was continued to March 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that Mr. Seneck could file a declaration regarding additional filing fees.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Continued To Jan-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition To Close Estate
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Continued To Dec-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Continued To Dec-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Senick for Stefan Norberg (Administrator).

Mr. Senick stated that the Estate was inventoried at more than $1,000,000.00, that the Client failed to file the Franchise Tax Board clearance and that taxes needed to be paid. In addition, he stated that the Client was the sole Beneficiary/Heir, that the Client has all of the assets, that he cannot get him to do what is necessary, that the property was sold and that the Client has control of those assets except for $25,000.00 that is in the Trust account. The Court granted the Petition for Allowance of Compensation to Attorney (subject to the written order). The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel was continued to December 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 as well as status for filing of petition to close estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Allowance Of Ordinary Compensation To Attorney And For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Senick for Stefan Norberg (Administrator).

Mr. Senick stated that the inventory was filed on Friday. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Stefan Norberg (Administrator) for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal status report. Copy of the OSC. to be sent to the Attorney of record. The return date is June 2, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
